title: Zombie Invade 100 Days
description: 僵尸入侵 100 天（高版本惊变重制）—— Same as Forge Labs 100 Days Zombie Apocalypse in new Minecraft
body:
## 简体中文 (Simplified Chinese)

以著名的僵尸启示录为原型，加上一些具有新功能的新模组在 Minecraft 新版本中制作的丧尸围城整合包！旨在尽可能多地还原僵尸启示录。

### 开始（v2.3）

- 创建世界的三种选择：平坦主世界（在数据包选择界面选择）、超平坦（见下方 v2.0~v2.2 版本）、正常世界
- 进入世界后由荒野手册提供后续帮助

<details>
<summary>历史版本</summary>

#### v2.0~2.2
- 建议使用**超平坦**模式，以村庄为根据地，建设防御工事（当然也可以游玩正常世界）
- 主世界默认生成失落城市（无需手动启用）
  - 正常超平坦世界无法生成失落城市，建议解决方法如下：创建世界时自定义超平坦 -> 预设 -> 主世界 -> 将 `minecraft:bedrock,130*minecraft:dirt,minecraft:grass_block;minecraft:plains` 替换至上方输入栏 -> 使用预设 -> 完成
  - 关闭主世界生成失落城市请前往 LostCities 模组设置 -> LostCities/common -> Profiles -> 删除 `minecraft:overworld` 这一项（点击右边按钮，提示文本错误仅为配置模组问题）

#### v1.x
- 建议使用**超平坦**模式，以村庄为根据地，建设防御工事（当然也可以游玩正常世界）
- 如果你想要更有趣和更具挑战性的游戏，可以在创建世界时点击`数据包`按钮并添加 [Zombie Invade Nether End](https://modrinth.com/datapack/zombie-invade-nether-end)(僵尸入侵下界和末地) 和 [Horde Nights](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blood-moon)(怪物之夜，即血月) 至右侧来加载它们

</details>

### 注明

- 中文社区请转到 [MC百科](https://www.mcmod.cn/modpack/835.html)
- 各版本更新内容请在 Changelog 标签查看
- 核心模组
  - 在 v2.1 及以下为 [僵尸游戏(Zombie Game)](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/11546.html) （感谢作者 阿骏/Aljun2007 使我产生了制作整合包的想法）
  - 在 v2.2 及以上为 [终焉之日(End of Days)](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/16472.html)

<details>
<summary>服务端</summary>

服务端在 v1.2 及以上版本提供，位于单版本页面（在 Versions 标签中点击某一版本名称可以进入），拉至页面底部找到带 server 标注的文件即可
  - 当前版本（v2.3）服务端在下载后请直接导入启动器安装，安装的位置即为服务端文件夹（与旧版本目录结构相同，可脱离启动器随意移动至任何位置方便开服），安装完成后依然按照以下方式操作
  - Windows 用户运行 `startserver.bat` 安装，以后每次需要启动服务器时再次运行即可
  - 其他系统请直接运行 Forge 安装器 `forge-xxx-installer.jar`（需要已经正确安装的 Java），完成后运行带 `start` 字样的脚本启动服务器

</details>

<details>
<summary>已还原的内容</summary>

- 丧尸材质 [Tissou's Zombie Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tissous-zombie-pack-optifine-1-7x-1-20)
- 玩家倒地救援 [Hardcore Revival](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/4187.html)
- 玩家受伤等屏幕效果 [EnhancedVisuals](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/2054.html)
- 生物死亡肢解流血效果 [Physics mod](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/3460.html)
- 双开门 [Quark](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/527.html)
- 生物血条 [Neat](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/619.html) 和伤害跳字 [TslatEntityStatus](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/9442.html)
- 刷怪笼自动销毁 [Ageing Spawners](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/5539.html)
- 动态环境（声音物理 [Sound Physics Remastered](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/8197.html) 和脚步声 [Presence Footstep](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/4819.html)）
- 连锁采集 [Ore Excavation](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/1955.html)
- 斯巴达的武器 [Spartan Weaponry](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/2297.html) 和盾 [Spartan Shields](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/2790.html)
- 动态的树 [Dynamic Trees](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/1071.html)
- _(以及更多…)_

</details>


## English

Remake from famous modpack Zombie Apocalypse, in new Minecraft version with new features and mods! The pack aims to restore Zombie Apocalypse as much as possible.

### Start (v2.3)

- Three world creation options: Flat Overworld (select in Data Packs interface), Superflat (see v2.0~v2.2 below), and normal world
- After entering the world, Wild Book will provide more help

<details>
<summary>Previous version</summary>

#### v2.0~2.2
- It's recommended to play in **Superflat** world type, building fortifications based on villages (of course you can still play normal world)
- The overworld now generates lost cities by default (no manually enable)
  - Normally, superflat worlds cannot generate lost cities, the suggested solution is as follows: Customise Superflat -> Presets -> Main world -> Replace `minecraft:bedrock,130*minecraft:dirt,minecraft:grass_block;minecraft:plains` in the input field above -> Use Preset -> Done
  - To disable the overworld generation of lost cities, please go to LostCities mod settings -> LostCities/common -> Profiles -> Delete `minecraft:overworld` (click the button on the right, the text error is just config mod's problem)

#### v1.x
- It's recommended to play in **Superflat** world type, building fortifications based on villages (of course you can still play normal world)
- If you want more interesting and challenging, you can click `Data Packs` button and add [Zombie Invade Nether End](https://modrinth.com/datapack/zombie-invade-nether-end) and [Horde Nights](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blood-moon) to the right side to load them when creating a new world

</details>

### Notes

- The only community is Chinese, link to [MC百科](https://www.mcmod.cn/modpack/835.html)
- Please check the Changelog tab for update contents of each version
- Core mods
  - v2.1 and below: [Zombie Game](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zombiegame) (Thanks to the author Aljun2007 for giving me the idea to make this modpack)
  - v2.2 and above: [End of Days](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/endofday)

<details>
<summary>Server</summary>

Server pack is available from v1.2 and above, located on the single version page (click on a version name in the Versions tab to enter), scroll to the bottom of the page to find the file marked with server
  - For the current version (v2.3), please import the server pack directly into a launcher after downloading, the installation location is the server folder (same directory structure as the old version, can be moved to any location for easy server setup), after installation, still do the following steps
  - Windows users run `startserver.bat` to install, then run again each time you need to start the server
  - For other systems, run the Forge installer `forge-xxx-installer.jar` directly (needs a Java that has been installed correctly), then run the script with `start` to start the server

</details>

<details>
<summary>Restored Contents</summary>

- Zombie textures [Tissou's Zombie Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tissous-zombie-pack-optifine-1-7x-1-20)
- Player downed rescue [Hardcore Revival](https://modrinth.com/mod/hardcore-revival)
- Player injury screen effects [EnhancedVisuals](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedvisuals)
- Creature death dismemberment and blood effects [Physics Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/physicsmod)
- Double door opening [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
- Creature health bar [Neat](https://modrinth.com/mod/neat) and damage numbers [TslatEntityStatus](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/9442.html)
- Spawner auto-destruction [Ageing Spawners](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ageing-spawners)
- Dynamic environment (sound physics [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered) and footstep sounds [Presence Footsteps](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/presence-footsteps-forge))
- Chain mining [Ore Excavation](https://modrinth.com/mod/ore-excavation)
- Spartan weapons [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry) and shields [Spartan Shields](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-shields)
- Dynamic trees [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees)
- _(And more...)_

</details>
